about-mama.english: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.
about-mama.label: A dua for the ones who raised me

about-baba.english: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.
about-baba.label: A dua for the ones who raised me

about-grandma.english: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.
about-grandma.label: A dua for the ones who raised us

about-grandpa.english: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.
about-grandpa.label: A dua for the ones who raised us

about-spouse.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعۡيُنٖ وَٱجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
about-spouse.translit: Rabbanā hab lanā min azwājinā wa dhurriyyātinā qurrata aʿyunin wa-jʿalnā lil-muttaqīna imāmā
about-spouse.english: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and children comfort to our eyes, and make us a model for the righteous.
about-spouse.label: A dua for our life together

about-baby.arabic: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي مِن لَّدُنكَ ذُرِّيَّةٗ طَيِّبَةًۖ إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ ٱلدُّعَآءِ
about-baby.translit: Rabbi hab lī min ladunka dhurriyyatan ṭayyibah, innaka samīʿu d-duʿāʾ
about-baby.english: My Lord, grant me from Yourself good offspring. Indeed, You hear all prayers.
about-baby.label: A dua for this little one

our-ramadan.arabic: رَبَّنَآ ءَاتِنَا فِي ٱلدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةٗ وَفِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ حَسَنَةٗ وَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ
our-ramadan.translit: Rabbanā ātinā fi d-dunyā ḥasanah, wa fi l-ākhirati ḥasanah, wa qinā ʿadhāba n-nār
our-ramadan.english: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
our-ramadan.label: A dua for our family
